title: Motor Commercial
definition: Motor Commercial Insurance policy provides cover for motor commercial vehicles against accidental damage, fire, theft, third party liability. Some of the categories covered are: tractor, trade (road risks), own goods, truck sure, PSV (Passenger Service Vehicle), PSV car hire and general cartage Motor Insurance. Who is it for? This is suitable for motor vehicle owners that use them for commercial purposes.
benefits: Tractor - The cover protects the tractor against accidental damage, fire, theft and third party liability when it is on its own wheel. The cover is taken for tractors used in agriculture and any other use. Own Goods - This covers motor commercial vehicles against accidental damage, fire, theft, third party liability and there is an extension of passenger covers while in the cabin. General Cartage Motor Insurance is insurance for commercial motor vehicles used for hire and reward. It covers risks of losses and damages to commercial vehicles while being used to transport third party goods. Also includes third party risks as required by the law. This policy is suitable for: large trucks, trailer, tankers, and water bowsers.

We will also cover the following: TruckSure - This is a tailor-made policy that covers motor commercial vehicles with more extensive coverage than the standard policy. The extensions include an excess waiver, loan repayment, loss of income, personal accident for loader, and driver which attracts an additional premium. Trade (Road Risks) - The cover is taken by motor traders/garages to protect them against road risks during the testing and movement of the vehicle on its own wheel from the dealer to the customer or the body builders. The value is provided per KG plate. PSV - This covers Passenger service vehicle and offers protection against accidental damage, fire, theft, third party liability, and passenger liability. The vehicle must be fully compliant with the PSV rules. PSV Car Hire - The cover is given for vehicles used for private hire which are chauffeur driven.
eligibility: Please contact Old Mutual Uganda for detailed eligibility and application requirements.
